      result.R: unknown

  0 -> 1 [strong] subject
  1 -> 2 [weak] call

=== Effect Flow ===
Kind: pipeline
Location: 40:36 - 40:82
Root: Layer.empty.pipe(Layer.provide(layerUnknown))

  [0] root {layer A=never E=never R=unknown} pipeline
      ==> [subject] -> [1]
  [1] pipeSubject {layer A=never E=never R=never} Layer.empty
      ==> [pipeable] -> [2]
  [2] pipeTransformation {layer A=never E=never R=unknown} step 0: Layer.provide

      label: pipeline
